message:
fix(sync): Add fsync to CSV writes and fix data race in state Save

- EnsureCSVFile: Use atomic write pattern with fsync before rename
- SaveToCSV: Use atomic write pattern with fsync before rename
- SyncState.Save: Remove racy LocalMachineID assignment (already set in Load)

These changes improve reliability by ensuring file writes are durable
before rename, and eliminate a potential data race when saving state.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
